description: pytrain (thin sf8) reference, LHC injection 450 GeV, BBLR only (45 LR/side at IP1/2/5/8), 1.8e11 p/bunch, 1.5 um, full 2460-bunch scheme, 3 solver iterations. Orbits x/y at MKIP1 (physical frame), dx/dy = deviation from bunch average; qx/qy fractional tunes, dqx/dqy = shift vs bare thin lattice.
